# SEO Image Guide — The Possah

A map of every image that appears in social cards, Google rich results, and structured data. Change these in the listed file; no other code needs touching.

---

## 1. Product Detail Page (PDP) — OG Image

**What it shows:** A branded card with the product photo, product name, price, and The Possah wordmark. Auto-generated — no static image needed.

**Generated by:** `app/(shop)/[gender]/[category]/[slug]/opengraph-image.tsx`

**How it works:** Next.js calls this route at build/request time and renders a 1200×630 PNG. It fetches the product's first photo from Supabase automatically.

**To change the layout or colours**, edit `opengraph-image.tsx` directly.

---

## 2. Category Pages — OG Image

**What it shows:** The category's hero image (e.g. the Sarees cover photo).

**Where it comes from:** `category.image_url` column in the `categories` Supabase table.

**To update:** Upload a new image to CDN, then update the `image_url` field for that category in Supabase → Table Editor → categories.

**Code:** `app/(shop)/[gender]/[category]/page.tsx` → `generateMetadata()` → `openGraph.images`

---

## 3. Homepage — Default OG Image

**What it shows:** Falls back to the Next.js/site-level OG image when no page-specific image is set.

**Where to set it:** `app/layout.tsx` → `metadata.openGraph.images` (or add a root `opengraph-image.tsx` alongside `app/layout.tsx`).

**Current state:** No root OG image is set — social crawlers will pick whatever image they find first.

**To fix:** Create `app/opengraph-image.tsx` (same pattern as PDP) **or** add a static image at `public/og-default.jpg` and reference it in `app/layout.tsx`.

---

## 4. Journal Articles — OG Image

**What it shows:** The article's `featured_image` if one exists; otherwise no OG image.

**Where it comes from:** `featured_image` column in the `journal_articles` Supabase table.

**To update:** Upload the image to CDN and paste the URL into `featured_image` for that article in Supabase.

**Code:** `app/(shop)/journal/[slug]/page.tsx` → `generateMetadata()` → `openGraph.images`

---

## 5. NewsArticle Schema — Publisher Logo

**What it shows:** Appears in Google Search (AMP/Top Stories) as the publisher brand logo.

**Current URL:** `https://cdn.thepossah.com/1781254169345-name.webp`

**To update:** Upload the new logo to CDN and change the URL in:
`app/(shop)/journal/[slug]/page.tsx` → `<script>` block → `publisher.logo.url`

**Google's requirement:** PNG or WebP, min 60×60 px, recommended 600×60 px (wide logo), background must be opaque.

---

## 6. Structured Data — ClothingStore sameAs

Not an image, but controls which social profiles Google associates with the brand.

**Current profiles:** Instagram, Pinterest, YouTube

**To update:** `app/(shop)/page.tsx` → first `<script type="application/ld+json">` → `sameAs` array.

---

## Quick Reference

| Page | Image source | Where to change |
|------|-------------|-----------------|
| Product (PDP) | Product's 1st photo in Supabase | Supabase → product_images |
| Category | category.image_url in Supabase | Supabase → categories |
| Homepage | Not set (add root opengraph-image.tsx) | app/layout.tsx or app/opengraph-image.tsx |
| Journal article | journal_articles.featured_image | Supabase → journal_articles |
| Journal publisher logo | Hardcoded CDN URL | app/(shop)/journal/[slug]/page.tsx |
